Text.Page:
[You're an exceptional soldier, . We'd like to present you with another award!

You can collect it from {@linkcreature:63#9000} in Velika. Thanks for all you do.

Rewards, rewards, rewards. That's all I ever hear you talking about.

What about my reward, huh? Where's the appreciation for the hard work I do, handing out items all day long?

Oh, fine. Hand over your federation bills and let's see what you can afford.
